latest.title: Monkeys use trees as invisible superhighways

latest.title: European hedgehogs don't curl up to sleep
latest.script_key: hedgehogs don t curl to sleep that s a myth watch the spines right behind the ears they stay flat that s because when danger hits they tense those muscles to lock into a spiky shield if they napped curled they d never get loose in time did you think they slept that way

latest.title: Storm clouds reveal a storm's heat engine
latest.script_key: storm clouds look solid from above but they re not those puffy white tops just sunlight reflecting off ice crystals not land or water that s why satellites mistake them for solid ground sometimes i thought these were mountains too until i saw the storm move next time you re up there look closer

latest.title: Storm clouds reveal a storm's heat engine
latest.script_key: storm clouds reveal the cloud spiral first watch the cloud spiral first because warm ocean air rises near the center and releases heat as clouds build rotation organizes that energy into bands from above the storm is not random it is an engine which satellite clue next

latest.title: Rivers drop heavy grains at slow edges
latest.script_key: rivers drop heavy grains at slow edges watch the calm edge first because that detail shows the mechanism in motion the source moment is serene river flowing through mountainous landscape fast water keeps lighter sand moving while slower water drops pieces it cannot carry by the last line the opening detail has a job viewers can name

latest.title: Rivers carve bends by stealing from one bank
latest.script_key: rivers move sideways while they flow watch the outside of the bend because faster water cuts that bank while slower water drops sediment inside the curve over time the whole river shifts across the landscape a bend is motion written in mud which water shape next

latest.title: Giant sequoias don’t grow roots like we think
latest.script_key: here s the part nobody tells you those massive sequoias you see aren t held up by deep roots they re braced by a shallow wide mat that spreads out farther than you can walk in an hour that s why one tree can lean sideways and still stay standing through storms

latest.title: hedgehog quills bend without hurting itself
latest.script_key: watch these quills bend like springs without a sound that s no accident each one s hollow so they flex without poking the hedgehog that s why it rolls so fast you almost feel the cushion under those spikes did you ever think they d be this bendy

latest.title: Snakes smell the air with their tongues
